description: The monitoring of our business needs a special vision to understand the values received by the monitoring. By adding Python script to manage data in entry, and PHP special views to give correct dashboard, it's a very powerful tool, that gives exact vision of the currently health of your system.
author: christophe M.
pros: The Pandora offers a large number of function, growing every month to cover all monitoring. It's customizable through PHP pages, Python Script, and can become a very dedicated monitoring tool. But, as a standard tool, with the Community Version (unpaid), it is already very powerful if you take time to configure properly. With the forum and bi-monthly update, it's always reactive to improvement and correction.
cons: The default views are a bit too much for developers and IT Manager. Needs some development to make it a great tools.

review_title: One of the best and most flexible software for monitoring of Applications, Servers, ITSM etc. !
description: Highly scalable software with wide acceptability all over across all partners and vendors ITSM and cloud environment. It helps in varied monitoring of IT servers and clouds and provides operational excellence all over. Their capability to get integrated and connected to over 500 plugins is just amazing and highly admirable as no other competitors is close to them. The Mainframe and IoT monitoring system are utilized at large scale by our organization and we are seeing some really great results today. Highly scalable and replicable across any point wide good output and performance.
author: Frinto A.
pros: The best and most promising software for complete monitoring and supervising of applications, servers, ITSM and any data device etc. end to end for its correct operating system and function. Highly popular monitoring and evaluation software in IT world as its the best software for carrying out the virtual monitoring and synthetic monitoring of the system through dashboard visibility round the clock. Best GIS tracking and highly scalable solution across multiple ITSM and devices integrated to different clouds and systems. Both free and trial version features are highly agile and continuously improves the function every now and then as per market requirements and upgradation
cons: The business processes and Tech development team are quite agile to our requirements. Though, there are few slip ups often observed while performing integration of softwares and servers across multi cloud environments. We have also requested for bringing in the customized version of the same at lower cost and price to have its maximum acceptability across all vendors and partners easily without any second thought.

review_title: Pandora FMS has been a game-changer in managing our IT infrastructure. It's easy and efficient.
author: Pedro L.
pros: Easy to use, comprehensive monitoring, helpful plugins, and great customer support.
cons: The interface can be overwhelming at first, and the setup process could be more streamlined.

review_title: Pandora FMS the perfect balance between price and quality.
description: In general, a good experience where I have been asked to monitor several servers with Windows and Linux operating systems, as well as network devices, where I have to make SNMP queries and report the health of the device, to generate trends and performance.
author: Oskar R.
pros: I like about Pandora FMS that infrastructure monitoring can be implemented in a simple way, it already has several integrated templates, so you just have to choose what you want to monitor the device and that's it, the configuration has already been applied.
cons: I would like you to improve the part where a template or configuration has already been applied, now modify it, in some cases you have to understand what the script is doing.

review_title: PandoraFMS excels in comprehensive network monitoring and managing our IT ecosystem health
description: PandoraFMS singlehandedly cater for all our IT monitoring needs at a reasonable price. It has has replaced the need to run and integrate expensive, complex and multiple monitoring systems. It offers high-end monitoring of our extensive IT landscape enabling us to identify and resolve urgent analysis unforeseen network issues and operations inefficiencies thus we are able to maintain an optimally healthy network and smooth operation flow at all time
author: Curtiss F.
pros: Having PandoraFMS system has proven to be crucial to us. It help us to evenly track and map out our devices, apps workstation, servers, OS ab and connections in our network. It has also integrated fully with our operations across our organization. It collects information from our operations and network components and summarise into reports and visual custom representation explaining the status, performance or any anomalies in the network. PandoraFMS provide us with realtime visibility into our network and chain of operations which help us to detect, troubleshoot at any point of the network and resolve the issues before they impact our operations .
cons: PandoraFMS provide a wide array of advanced features that were overwhelming and caused a steep learning curve at the onset but once we got the hang of it, we treasure the extensive and unified monitoring capabilities.

description: I prefer used this tools because its to good for initiators in this world of monitoring servers,routers,etc and it is easy to notification with chats online (slack)
author: Franco N.
pros: Interface web is really good, not requiered too many knowledge to get report and graphs
cons: I think that way to get and add agents its little difficult in comparison with other toosl (prtg)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I have always had a good experience using this service and will continue to do so. I love how easy it is to use.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love how easy and user friendly it is. It is very simple to start using and learn to use. Would highly recommend!
cons: I do not have any cons about this product. I love using it and will recommend it to everyone i know looking forbthis service.

description: There is improved operations from critical security fixes. Early detection of network failures enables us to come up with solution before it is too late. Data virtualization has enhanced secure collaboration and effective application performance.
author: Bentson C.
pros: Pandora FMS has efficient network system that blocks cyber attacks. It notifies IT team when there is security hitches in the workflow infrastructure. This tool has automated reporting system that provides performance algorithms.
cons: The performance capabilities displayed by this product since we deployed it has been great.

review_title: A very reliable and easy to use solution for network monitoring
description: It really does for what we have purchased it and that's it, so, overall, we are really happy with its output. Other than that if they improve their support it can really give a better customer experience.
author: Rishikesh H.
pros: For us, Pandora FMS proved to be a unique and very flexible solution for system monitoring, and it helped our organization a lot. Pandora FMS has a combination of many good features and it easily fits the organization with big environment. Our organization is multi OS environment and it really fits this criteria, and this was the main reason for finalizing Pandora FMS.
cons: I have complaints about their support, they are not bad but they really need to improve it to give a better customer experience. The second and last suggestion I am having for them is that they should make their graphics more futuristic to give them a good look.

description: My experience with Pandora FMS has been very positive. The software is highly secure, reliable and customizable and has a user-friendly UI. Additionally, the price point is competitive with other system monitoring and management solutions.
author: Andrew S.
pros: One of the best things about Pandora FMS is its flexibility. It can be used to monitor any type of IT infrastructure, from physical systems to virtual machines and cloud services. It is also highly customizable, so you can tailor the system’s monitoring and alerting capabilities to meet your exact needs. Additionally, Pandora FMS has a comprehensive user interface that makes it easy to understand and use, so you can quickly get up and running.It also has a strong reputation for reliability, with a track record of high uptime and fast response times. Finally, Pandora FMS is relatively affordable.
cons: Pandora FMS can be difficult to set up and configure for larger IT infrastructures, as it requires a certain level of IT knowledge.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: The implementation of critical security fixes has led to improved operations. Early detection of network failures allows us to develop solutions before issues escalate. Additionally, data virtualization has strengthened secure collaboration and optimized application performance.
author: Vibhor S.
pros: Pandora FMS features an efficient network system that prevents cyberattacks. It alerts the IT team whenever there are security issues within the workflow infrastructure. The tool also includes an automated reporting system that delivers performance analytics.
cons: Since my company deployed this product, its performance capabilities have exceeded expectations. It has consistently delivered impressive results, demonstrating reliability and efficiency in handling our needs. The improvements we've seen in performance have been notable, making it a valuable addition to our operations.

review_title: Very helpful and highly configurable tool
description: The software is very helpful for us and we are really enjoying it. Initially it may feel difficult to understand it but with time people start getting use to it and they start getting friendly with it.
author: ranu S.
pros: This to is comes with very high level of configuration and flexibility. Another best part about this tool is usability, we are using it with VMs over cloud, server available with us physically to data center. When it comes to user interface, it is very user friendly and easy to understand. It also has good reporting system, Realtime monitoring and alarming system.
cons: Getting friendly with this software is bit difficult and deployment requires expert IT team.

description: It helps my job to be more proactive instead of reactive, I have all the visibility of my critical infrastructure.
author: Jose A.
pros: I love the flexibility of the system, iI always say it is like a 'blank' sheet of paper, you can 'write' anything on it. The ore you know the system, the more you can do with it...
cons: It could be better at the 'factory default' reports and graphics, the look n' feel of the graphics too.

review_title: If you are an IT administrator, you need it and you know it
description: My experience in general? I couldn't do my job well without this tool. PandoraFMS shows everything, and if you see everything in your networks, you can make improvements and fix problems, even before they arise.
author: Angelo M.
pros: We started using Pandora FMS with some misgivings. But it turns out that at this very moment and probably for several years to come, it will be an indispensable part of our IT infrastructure. Thanks to PandoraFMS, we discovered that we had no control over our assets and networks. It is well said in some Marketing article "what cannot be measured, cannot be controlled". And it was our case. We did not know where the origin of the network problems was, gigabit networks running at ethernet speed or worse, incredibly high latency. We were able to solve all this thanks to the active and passive monitoring of PandoraFMS.
cons: I wish it had a magic button to install and configure for the first time.

description: Experience with pandora is osm with communication between teams understanding business issues, finding and providing best solutions, usefulness of tools and provides full guidance on that
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Pandora is most likable software ever because they provide all business problems solutions. I like most useful tool cqll cloud and visualization.
cons: There is not dislike or unlikely use able software. Pandora provides every solution for problems with all time customer support.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Quality Monitoring and System Automation Product
description: Pandora FMS is the powerful solution that increases the validation of different processes, the business needs, and the database. More so, Pandora FMS has a fruitful cloud space and network control for enterprise.
author: Derrick S.
pros: Pandora FMS has a cloud monitoring system, that allows businesses to conduct their operations efficiently. Besides, Pandora FMS has proper database controlling systems, which increases the value of the analytical solution, and there is credibility of the business transactions.
cons: Pandora FMS stipulates the monitoring and the management of all the business systems, which increases automation and credibility of different business activities.

author: Neil W.
pros: Pandora FMS is a very handy monitoring tool for daily use. Accurate with metrics and useful reporting function for analysis of server performance. We are planning to widely distributed the agent cross more servers for our customers.
cons: Improvement in customized monitoring and customized scripts might be extremely useful.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Flexibility and the vast amount of features
cons: plugins are a bit tedious to setup but manageable when spending some time on it
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Ahmet Fatih Y.
pros: Learning management systems and the users of them are monitored and ensured that they have stable connectivity thus making the most of the interactive T-S interaction. Monitoring is made custom so it is tailored for the needs of the institution.
cons: It can be resource intensive so it may need faster hardware and internet connection.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The swiss-army knife of monitoring solutions
author: Axel A.
pros: Its flexibility to adapt to new technologies: we've found no application, server or cloud provider that couldn't be monitored.
cons: It's not as out-of-the-box as they say. This solution requires proper training to get the 100% out of it.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Pnadora FMS kmis most trusted name in the field of monitoring solutions providers. Its very easy to use and to implement at any kind of system. It can be seamlessely integrated with android, windows, linux systems. Another USP is 24/7 customer support.
cons: Only low point is high cost. However, pricing is justified with the solution and support provided by the team.

pros: Best tool in his category, even beter than comercial software

pros: You can keep up with data on your system.
cons: There is not any improvements needed at this time.

author: Pnina T.

cons: For ubuntu it is pretty hard to configure at the start.

description: Dashboards for monitoring issues are really reliable assuming you have them set up correctly
author: Nicholas M.
pros: I like that it is open source and thus anyone using it can improve the software
cons: The monitoring services within can be a bit non-user friendly
